identity.mission: Create a cinematic, high-authority digital presence for Bare Force One.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Blend Defense Tech with Swiss Precision.
Content is King: Every pixel must support the mission narrative.
Negative Space: Use deep dark voids to create focus.
Contrast: High contrast text on dark backgrounds.

effects: Subtle inner glow on active elements

hero_background.alt: Aerial view of city at night with cybernetic overlay
hero_background.description: Primary Hero Background. Apply dark overlay (opacity-80) and blue vignette.

team_meeting.alt: Serious diverse team in modern office
team_meeting.description: Use for 'About' or 'Culture' section. Ensure it's desaturated to match the theme.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 24px usually. Use strictly functional icons (Shield, Server, Globe, Cpu).

variants.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]
variants.outline: border border-blue-500/50 text-blue-400 hover:border-blue-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-blue-500/10 py-3 px-8 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest transition-all

Card.base: bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 p-8 hover:border-blue-500/50 transition-colors duration-300 group

Input.base: bg-slate-950/50 border border-slate-700 text-slate-200 p-4 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 outline-none w-full transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Fonts: Import 'Barlow Condensed' (400,600,700) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (400,500) from Google Fonts in index.css.
3. Global CSS: Set body background to #0a0f1c and text to slate-200.
4. Navigation: Create a sticky navbar with a glass effect (backdrop-blur-md bg-navy/80).
5. Hero: Implement the 'Aerial City' image as a full-screen background with a heavy gradient overlay (to-navy from-transparent).
6. Cards: Use the 'Tracing Beam' or simple hover-border-light effects for the Capabilities grid.
7. Forms: Ensure all inputs have accessible contrast labels and focus states.
8. Footer: Massive footer with 'Bare Force One' in large typography.
9. Testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

universal_guidelines.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text.
universal_guidelines.spacing: Use comfortable spacing (p-8, p-12) to avoid clutter.
universal_guidelines.interactive: All interactive elements must have hover and focus states.
